title: Inception
review: A masterpiece of layered storytelling. Nolan takes dream logic and turns it into a breathtaking heist thriller that rewards repeated viewing.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
review: One of the greatest films ever made. A deeply moving story about hope, friendship, and perseverance set inside the walls of a prison.

title: The Dark Knight
review: Heath Ledger's Joker is one of cinema's greatest villains. A gripping, morally complex superhero film that transcends the genre entirely.

title: Parasite
review: A genre-defying social thriller that shifts tone brilliantly. The first non-English film to win Best Picture at the Oscars, and it fully deserved it.

title: Interstellar
review: Visually stunning and emotionally ambitious. The docking scene and the fifth dimension sequence are among the most memorable in modern cinema.

title: The Godfather
review: The definitive crime epic. Every performance, every shot, every line of dialogue is perfect. A film that set the standard for generations.

title: Pulp Fiction
review: Bold, nonlinear, and endlessly quotable. Tarantino redefined independent cinema with this electric anthology of interconnected stories.

title: Spirited Away
review: A magical and imaginative journey unlike anything else in animation. Studio Ghibli at its absolute peak — a timeless coming-of-age story.

title: Get Out
review: A razor-sharp social horror film that works on every level. Peele announced himself as a major directorial voice with this stunning debut.

title: The Matrix
review: A revolutionary sci-fi action film that changed cinema forever. Bullet time, red pills, and a philosophy degree hidden inside a blockbuster.
